name: Personal status aggregate + update/delete ownership gates
description: Worker `getBudgetStatusHandler` branches on `scope`: household uses the existing path; personal uses new `getPersonalBudgetSpendSummary` aggregating only `e.spent_by_user_id = ? AND e.household_id IS NULL`. `updateBudget` and `deleteBudget` apply the same ownership gate: household needs active admin membership via `canManageBudgets`; personal needs `currentUser.id == ownerUserId` (else 404). Audit log: `household_id = null` for personal events.

planned: Integration test seeds 1 personal expense + 1 household expense in the same month and asserts personal budget status includes only the personal expense.
Cross-user PATCH/DELETE on a personal budget returns 404.
Audit log entry for a personal `budget.created` event has `household_id = null`.
